yes.title: Yes
yes.description: Feature is lit, usually from evening civil twilight to morning civil twilight, either by purpose-built lighting or from nearby features

no.title: No
no.description: There are no lights installed, and no artificial illumination at night

24/7.description: There are lights installed, which are always on even during the day

disused.title: Disused
disused.description: There are lights installed, but are broken or out of use in the long-term

automatic.title: Automatic
automatic.description: There are lights installed, but only turn on when something passes by, usually through motion detection

limited.title: Limited
limited.description: There are lights installed, but are not always on during the night due to adoption of part-night lighting

interval.title: Interval
interval.description: Intended for use by flashing lights, typically on top of tall structures like towers, buildings, or bridges
